paper_focus.title: Microstructure and tensile behavior of Fe-8Mn-6Al-0.2C low density steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To investigate the transformation characteristics and mechanical stability of retained austenite, as well as the work hardening behavior and fracture mechanism, in Fe-8Mn-6Al-0.2C low-density steel.
main_process_variables: Solution treatment temperature (700–1000 °C, 1 h, water quenching)
Hot rolling (start 1150 °C, finish 850 °C, water quench to 550 °C, air cooling)
